title: onobrychis peduncularis subsp. matritensis
intro: Onobrychis peduncularis subsp. matritensis, also known as Spanish bird's-foot trefoil, is a subspecies of annual or biennial plant in the legume family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Spanish bird's-foot trefoil include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a useful treatment for skin conditions and injuries. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can also be consumed as a dietary supplement.
